overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking and then running through a vibrant cyberpunk street market. The scene features neon signage, street vendors, vending machines, and a mix of residential and commercial buildings under a clear afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with safety railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the right side of the elevated walkway
modern glass facade building with reflective windows
street food vendor cart with red and yellow umbrella
tall palm tree visible beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view walking along an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings. A glass office building rises on the left while a food vendor with a red umbrella appears on the left side. The scene is set in a cyberpunk urban environment with clear afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with dense neon signage and overhead wires

events.description: walkway becomes narrower and more enclosed with dense overhead utility wires and neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through a narrower street lined with vending machines and neon signs

entered.detail: concrete apartment building with balconies and air conditioning units
illuminated vending machine with BURRITO DOC signage in red and yellow
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters in pink and blue
wooden utility pole with dense overhead electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks into a narrower commercial street section with dense overhead utility wires and neon signage. A Burrito Doc vending machine appears on the right, and Japanese neon signs illuminate the left side. The metal railings give way to building facades as the walkway descends to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered street with homeless encampment and trash accumulation

events.description: character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: running forward through the street, passing by pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shorts running ahead of the player

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside, next to a homeless encampment
large piles of blue and white trash bags stacked along the building
street vendor stall with white canopy and green umbrella

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run through a more cluttered section of the street. A burning barrel and piles of trash bags line the left side near a homeless encampment. The street features more vendor stalls with canopies, and the density of pedestrians increases as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial market street with dense vendor stalls and neon signage

events.description: crowd density increases significantly with many pedestrians and vendors

agents.ego_description: running through a densely populated market area, navigating between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large pedestrian in blue tank top walking in the same direction

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying advertisements above the street
row of street vendor stalls with illuminated signs and awnings
dense cluster of neon signs and banners spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running through a densely packed commercial market street. Numerous vendor stalls with illuminated signs line both sides, and large neon billboards hang overhead. The crowd density increases significantly with many pedestrians walking in various directions, creating a bustling cyberpunk market atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open elevated walkway into a dense, neon-lit commercial street. It begins by tracking a character along a concrete path with metal railings, passing a glass office building and a food vendor under a red umbrella in the clear afternoon light. As the character moves forward, the open walkway descends toward street level, causing the railings to give way to towering building facades. The scene then shifts into a narrower urban corridor where the sky is crisscrossed by dense overhead utility wires and the lighting is punctuated by Japanese neon signs. Finally, the camera passes a Burrito Doc vending machine on the right as the environment becomes fully immersed in the vibrant glow of the cyberpunk market.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a cluttered urban alleyway into the heart of a densely packed commercial market. It begins with the character breaking into a sprint past a burning barrel and piles of trash bags near a homeless encampment. As the character moves forward, the street opens up to reveal an increasing number of vendor stalls with canopies and a growing crowd of pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a bustling market hub where illuminated signs line both sides of the path and large neon billboards hang overhead. Finally, the environment reaches its peak density, immersing the character in a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere filled with people moving in every direction.
